High Interest in Our Graduate Programs: Applications Increased by %48

16.09.2025

In just its 10th year since its establishment, Ibn Haldun University continues to serve as a hub for high-quality research in the social sciences worldwide by admitting outstanding students to its undergraduate and graduate programs. In this context, applications to our graduate programs have increased by 48% compared to last year, while participation in the academic assessment exams has risen by 61%.

Applications from Türkiye’s citizens to our graduate programs increased by 48% compared to last year. When international applicants are also included, the total number of applications to our graduate programs rose by 30% compared to the previous year.

In addition to the rise in applications, participation in the academic evaluation exams also showed a remarkable increase: 61% among Türkiye’s citizens and 39% overall compared to last year. These figures provide significant insight into the growing interest and quality of prospective students in our programs.

A Hub for High-Quality Research in the Social Sciences

In just its 10th year since establishment, Ibn Haldun University continues to be recognized as a hub for the social sciences both in Türkiye and internationally, attracting strong interest from prospective students not only in undergraduate programs but also in graduate programs. In this context, the number of students admitted to our graduate programs has increased by 33%.

At Ibn Haldun University, our master’s and doctoral students build their academic careers on solid foundations from the very beginning of their studies through opportunities such as Teaching Assistantships and Research Assistantships—positions available at only a handful of universities in Türkiye. In addition to high-quality education, research, and project opportunities offered in our graduate programs, students who meet the requirements can also benefit from full tuition waivers, as well as a “High Achievement Scholarship” of 27,000 TL per month for 12 months or a “Merit Scholarship” of 18,000 TL per month for 9 months.

For more information about our graduate programs and the opportunities we offer to graduate students, please visit

https://apply.ihu.edu.tr/en
